inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height of the retaining wall from base to top.

inputs.label: Soil Unit Weight
inputs.businessContext: Unit weight of the backfill soil.

inputs.label: Angle of Internal Friction
inputs.businessContext: Effective angle of internal friction of the backfill soil.

inputs.label: Surcharge Load
inputs.businessContext: Uniform surcharge load on the backfill surface.

breakdown.label: Active Soil Force
breakdown.businessContext: Horizontal force due to active earth pressure from soil.

breakdown.label: Surcharge Force
breakdown.businessContext: Horizontal force due to surcharge load.

breakdown.label: Overturning Moment at Base
breakdown.businessContext: Resultant overturning moment about the base of the wall per meter length.
